writings.text: 据え膳喰わぬは男の恥
据え膳食わぬは男の恥

readings.text: すえぜんくわぬはおとこのはじ

furigana.writing: 据え膳喰わぬは男の恥
furigana.reading: すえぜんくわぬはおとこのはじ

furigana.writing: 据え膳食わぬは男の恥
furigana.reading: すえぜんくわぬはおとこのはじ

glossary: it is shameful to reject the advances of a woman
not eating the meal set before him is a man's shame
shameful is he who spurns a woman's invitation
